data.title: Berkshire Hathaway expands further into Japan with more stakes in Mitsubishi
data.description:
Berkshire Hathaway has pushed its stake in Mitsubishi past the 10% threshold, Mitsubishi said Thursday in a formal statement. The holding, made through Berkshire’s insurance subsidiary National Indemnity Company, rose to 10. 23%, up from 9. 74% in March. This increase makes the U. S. conglomerate an even bigger shareholder in Japan’s biggest trading company. A Mitsubishi spokesperson […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/berkshire-hathaway-more-stakes-in-mitsubishi/

data.title: U.S. Commerce Department and Chainlink Partner to Bring Macroeconomic Data On-Chain
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Commerce (%DOC) announced a groundbreaking collaboration with %Blockchain oracle provider %Chainlink to publish official macroeconomic data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis
source: http://www.yolowire.com/latestarticles/21277/us-commerce-department-and-chainlink-partner-to-bring-macroeconomic-data-on-chain

data.title: CFTC provides clarity on US access to foreign crypto exchanges after being ‘driven out’
data.description:
The CFTC clarified on Thursday that non-U. S. exchanges have a path that allows Americans to trade on their platforms.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/368689/cftc-provides-clarity-on-us-access-to-foreign-crypto-exchanges-after-being-driven-out?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin Not ‘Out of the Danger Yet’ As BTC Flashes Signs of Topping Out, According to Analytics Firm – Here’s the Outlook
data.description:
Analytics platform Swissblock is warning that a key metric is flashing a bearish signal for Bitcoin (BTC). Swissblock says that its proprietary Risk Oscillator metric, which signals the direction of market sentiment using on-chain data, price behavior and other criteria, suggests Bitcoin may have already reached a cycle peak.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/28/bitcoin-not-out-of-the-danger-yet-as-btc-flashes-signs-of-topping-out-according-to-analytics-firm-heres-the-outlook/

data.title: PYTH skyrockets 60% as US government taps Pyth Network to verify economic data on-chain
data.description:
The US Department of Commerce has published GDB on blockchain for the first time. It has selected Pyth Network as the oracle platform to verify and distribute economic data. PYTH saw a sharp price increase after the news. The United States continues to establish itself as the international hub for blockchain and cryptocurrency undertakings
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/pyth-skyrockets-60-as-us-government-taps-pyth-network-to-verify-economic-data-on-chain/

data.title: SEC Delays Decision on Grayscale's Ethereum ETF Staking Feature
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has postponed its decision regarding the addition of a staking feature to Grayscale's spot Ethereum ETF. This delay comes amid ongoing discussions and evaluations of the proposed changes to the investment product. The SEC's decision is highly anticipated by market participants, as it could impact the broader acceptance and functionality of cryptocurrency ETFs in the financial market.

data.description:
The CFTC's new guidance applies to crypto exchanges, giving foreign firms a pathway to operating in the United States.
source: https://decrypt.co/337230/cftc-to-allow-us-citizens-to-trade-on-binance-other-foreign-crypto-exchanges

data.title: SPI Backs Tornado Cash Devs with $500K Legal Fund, Says ‘Writing Code Is Not a Crime’
data.description:
Solana Policy Institute announced $500,000 donation to legal defense funds of Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev, the developers behind sanctioned Tornado Cash crypto mixer, as Storm was convicted in August 2025 on conspiracy charges for operating unlicensed money-transmitting business.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/spi-backs-tornado-cash-devs-with-500k-legal-fund-says-writing-code-is-not-a-crime/

data.title: Trump-backed Bitcoin mining firm to go public on Nasdaq next month
data.description:
American Bitcoin, the mining company partly owned by Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, is preparing to go public on the Nasdaq in September, Reuters reported on Aug. 28. The firm, launched in March, is 80% owned by Toronto-based Hut 8, one of North America’s largest crypto miners
source: https://cryptoslate.com/trump-backed-bitcoin-mining-firm-to-go-public-on-nasdaq-next-month/

data.title: MN Capital Exec Says ETH, SOL, BNB About to Explode – Is Altseason About to Begin?
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/mn-capital-exec-says-eth-sol-bnb-about-to-explode-is-altseason-about-to-begin/

data.title: CFTF Investigating Pathways to Allow U.S. Traders Access to Offshore Crypto Exchanges
data.description:
The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is actively conducting a thorough investigation into potential pathways that would enable traders in the United States to gain access to offshore cryptocurrency exchanges, which are often perceived as more flexible and innovative platforms for trading digital assets. This exploration seeks to understand the regulatory and operational frameworks that could facilitate such access while ensuring compliance with U.S. laws and protecting investors in the rapidly evolving landscape of cryptocurrency trading.
source: https://blocknews.com/cftf-investigating-pathways-to-allow-u-s-traders-access-to-offshore-crypto-exchanges/

data.title: Canada’s current account deficit blows past records amid trade war
data.description:
Canada’s external accounts swung to a new low in the second quarter as sales to the United States shrank during the trade fight, pushing the country’s current account shortfall to a record. Statistics Canada said Thursday the deficit widened to C$21. 16 billion ($15. 4 billion) in the April–June period. That is the biggest gap since at […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canada-us-trade-fight-drives-deficit/

data.title: Bitcoin’s $112K Support Under Fire — Bull Run Pause or Market Top?
data.description:
Bitcoin has returned to the crucial $112K support level, facing intense pressure that could either spark the continuation of the bull run or signal a local peak as BTC Supply in Profit recently fell below the 90% threshold.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoins-112k-support-under-fire-bull-run-pause-or-market-top/
